sn21.5:1.1: Sāvatthiyaṁ vihārati. Atha kho āyasmā sujāto yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami. Addasā kho bhagavā āyasmantaṁ sujātaṁ dūratova āgacchantaṁ. Disvāna bhikkhū āmantesi: "ubhayenevāyaṁ, bhikkhave, kulaputto sobhati – yañca abhirūpo dassanīyo pāsādiko paramāya vaṇṇapokkharatāya samannāgato, yassa catthāya kulaputtā sammadeva agārasmā anagāriyaṁ pabbajanti tadanuttaraṁ brahmacariyapariyosānaṁ diṭṭheva dhamme sayaṁ abhiññā sacchikatvā upasampajja vihāratī"ti.
sn21.5:2.3:
"Sobhati vatāyaṁ bhikkhu,
ujubhūtena cetasā;
Vippayutto visaṁyutto,
anupādāya nibbuto;
Dhāreti antimaṁ dehaṁ,
jetvā māraṁ savāhinin"ti.
Pañcamaṁ.
